stadiums.fifaTitle: Estadio Ciudad de Mexico (Mexico City Stadium)

entrances.guidance: Main ramp access; wheelchair bays nearby

support.accessibleSeating: Accessible seats mostly Category 1; wheelchair bays with companion seats
support.calmRoom: None listed; quiet concourse areas near Puerta 1 on request
support.visualAssist: Braille and tactile signage limited; no audio-descriptive commentary listed - staff guides available on request; service-animal relief area outside Puerta 1 on request
support.calmPathHint: Arrive early via Puerta 1 ramp to avoid main crowd flows

amenities.drinkingWater: Water fountains and vendors on all concourses
amenities.medicalAid: First aid posts at Puertas 1 and 7
amenities.babyCare: Nursing room near Puerta 1 guest services
amenities.prayerSpace: Multi-faith room on main concourse, ask guest services

stadiums.city: East Rutherford, New Jersey (New York/New Jersey)

entrances.guidance: Wheelchair escort from gate on request
Near Plaza Level sensory pod and elevator lobby
Wheelchair escort from gate on request

support.accessibleSeating: Wheelchair, low-mobility, and companion seating on all levels
support.calmRoom: KultureCity sensory pods at two elevator lobbies (Plaza Level HCLTech; 3rd-floor Moody's); sensory bags (noise-cancelling headphones, fidget toys, weighted lap pads) at Guest Service booths
support.auditoryAssist: Assistive listening via ListenWIFI app; captioning on ribbon boards and concourse TVs
support.visualAssist: Braille and tactile signage at elevators and restrooms; audio-descriptive commentary receivers at Guest Service booths; service-animal relief area outside the MetLife Gate
support.lifts: Elevator lobbies at Plaza Level HCLTech and 3rd-floor Moody's, plus all seating levels
support.calmPathHint: Enter via HCLTech Gate for shortest path to the Plaza Level sensory pod

amenities.medicalAid: First aid stations on Plaza and Upper concourses
amenities.babyCare: Nursing room at Guest Services, Plaza Level

entrances.guidance: Escalator-heavy; not recommended for mobility needs

support.calmRoom: Sensory room near Entry A guest services; sensory bags available
